chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Sale of Pasture, Crops, Trees, Lands, Servants, Water Rights, and Real Estate

text: 3874 - وَ رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِي اَلْحَسَنِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ مَاءِ اَلْوَادِي فَقَالَ "إِنَّ اَلْمُسْلِمِينَ شُرَكَاءُ فِي اَلْمَاءِ وَ اَلنَّارِ وَ اَلْكَلَإِ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3874 - Muhammad bin Sinan narrated from Abu Al-Hasan (as) who said: I asked him about the water of the valley.
Imam (as) said: "Indeed, Muslims are partners in water, fire, and pasture."
